steps.title: Find room C probability
steps.content:
The visitors are only in rooms A, B, or C, so the probabilities add to $1$.
$$P(C)=1-0.45-0.30=0.25$$

steps.title: Convert probability to visitors
steps.content:
Multiply the probability for room C by the $400$ total visitors.
$$0.25\cdot400=100$$
The answer is D.
